<!-- Generated by xlsx_to_yml.py. Do not edit this file directly. -->

### Working Papers

Lorenzo Bonasera, David Pisinger  
**Joint Rashomon and Robustness Optimization for Interpretable Contextual Decision\-Making**  
*In preparation*

Lorenzo Bonasera, David Pisinger  
**Sequential Decision Support for Implementing Near\-Optimal Integer Programming Solutions**  
*Submitted*

### Journal Articles

Lorenzo Bonasera, Emilio Carrizosa  
**[A unified approach to extract interpretable rules from tree ensembles via Integer Programming](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.cor.2025.107283)**  
*Computers & Operations Research (2025)*

Lorenzo Bonasera  
**[Operations Research for Interpretable Machine Learning](https://link.springer.com/article/10.1007/s10288-025-00590-2)**  
*4OR \- PhD Thesis (2025)*

Ambrogio Maria Bernardelli, Lorenzo Bonasera, Davide Duma, Eleonora Vercesi  
**[Multi\-objective stochastic scheduling of inpatient and outpatient surgeries](https://link.springer.com/article/10.1007/s10696-024-09542-0)**  
*Flexible Services and Manufacturing Journal (2024)*

Lorenzo Bonasera, Stefano Gualandi  
**[Optimal shapelets tree for time series interpretable classification](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.ejco.2024.100091)**  
*EURO Journal on Computational Optimization (2024)*

### Book Chapters and Conference Proceedings

Aliza Katharina Reif, Lorenzo Bonasera, Stjepan Picek, Oscar Hernán Ramírez\-Agudelo, Michael Karl  
**[Black\-Box Universal Adversarial Attack on Automatic Speech Recognition Systems for Maritime Radio Communication Using Evolutionary Strategies](https://dl.acm.org/doi/full/10.1145/3733799.3762974)**  
*18th ACM Workshop on Artificial Intelligence and Security (2025)*

Lorenzo Bonasera, Davide Duma, Stefano Gualandi  
**[Learning Sparse\-Lets for Interpretable Classification of Event\-interval Sequences](https://link.springer.com/chapter/10.1007/978-3-031-62922-8_1)**  
*15th Metaheuristics International Conference (2024)*
